planning_summary: The planned digital twin for CNC machining systems is focused on providing real-time data-driven insights and automated decision-making processes to optimize scheduling, maintenance, and quality control. The feasible capabilities identified support the R2 level of the 4R Framework, which involves replicating the physical system in a virtual environment.
risks_or_notes: The current planning does not include detailed modeling or validation steps required for R3 (Reality) and R4 (Relational) levels, such as predictive models and autonomous decision-making. These will need to be addressed in future phases.

R1.summary: The digital twin purpose is defined, but the detailed system boundaries, components, and data collection processes are not explicitly outlined.

gate_scores.criterion: The digital twin purpose, scope, and supported decisions are explicitly defined.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of defining the DT purpose or scope.
gate_scores.rationale: The use case statement is implied but not clearly defined. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: UX.BV

gate_scores.criterion: System boundaries, major components, inputs/outputs, and important states are identified.
gate_scores.evidence: System boundaries and components are identified in Step 1 output.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence from Step 1 output. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IR.EG, IR.IO

gate_scores.criterion: Critical variables are selected without major over-instrumentation or missing context.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit data collection pipeline or storage strategy mentioned.
gate_scores.rationale: Data collection details are implied but not clearly defined. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.AI, DS.TR, UX.RM

gate_scores.criterion: A repeatable data collection and storage pipeline exists.
gate_scores.evidence: No structured data schema or validation process described.
gate_scores.rationale: Data structure and validation processes are implied but not explicitly outlined. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.AI, IR.ET, DS.ST, IR.EG

gate_scores.criterion: Collected data is structured, usable, and verified against known system behavior.
gate_scores.evidence: Some evidence of defining the DT purpose in Step 1 output.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence from Step 1 output. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.TR

action_items_tailored: Define the digital twin's purpose, scope, and expected outcomes clearly.
Document system boundaries, included/excluded components, and key interactions.

R2.summary: The planned digital twin will replicate the CNC machining systems in a virtual environment to produce similar outputs given the same inputs.

gate_scores.criterion: R1 is already satisfied.
gate_scores.evidence: The digital twin purpose is defined and supported by feasible capabilities.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear evidence from Step 1 output.

gate_scores.criterion: Replication targets, required outputs, and acceptable error thresholds are defined.
gate_scores.evidence: Integration with existing enterprise systems (ERP, EAM) is planned.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear evidence from Step 1 output.

gate_scores.criterion: A modeling platform has been selected and the system has been mapped into a digital architecture.
gate_scores.evidence: Real-time data acquisition and streaming are feasible capabilities.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear evidence from Step 3 output.

gate_scores.criterion: Live or recorded data can drive model inputs and updates.
gate_scores.evidence: Basic visualization is planned for operations managers.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear evidence from Step 1 output.

gate_scores.criterion: The model has been tested against real behavior and verified to reproduce outputs with acceptable deviation.
gate_scores.evidence: Real-time monitoring of machine health and tool usage is feasible capabilities.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear evidence from Step 3 output.

action_items_tailored: Define the replication targets and acceptable error thresholds.
Select a modeling environment and map physical components to digital counterparts.

R3.summary: The planned digital twin will run independently of the physical system, predict behavior for scenarios not directly observed, and provide actionable insights.

gate_scores.criterion: R2 is already satisfied.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of defining prediction targets or acceptable error thresholds.
gate_scores.rationale: The planning does not include detailed predictive models or validation steps.

gate_scores.criterion: Prediction targets, decision variables, and objective functions are defined.
gate_scores.evidence: Artificial intelligence is planned for real-time decision-making.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence from Step 3 output. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can run without continuous live dependency on the physical system.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of running the DT independently without continuous live dependency on physical systems.
gate_scores.rationale: The planning does not include detailed validation steps or independent execution capability. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.BP, DS.AS

gate_scores.criterion: Predictive or scenario-exploration models are implemented.
gate_scores.evidence: Real-time monitoring is planned for machine health and tool usage.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence from Step 3 output. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can evaluate what-if conditions and provide actionable recommendations or optimized results.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of providing actionable insights or recommendations.
gate_scores.rationale: The planning does not include detailed decision-making processes or outputs. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.OS

action_items_tailored: Define what the DT must predict and set allowable error thresholds.
Implement real-time monitoring and validation workflows.

R4.summary: The planned digital twin will utilize AI to make autonomous decisions, detect anomalies, and take corrective actions.

gate_scores.criterion: R3 is already satisfied.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of defining autonomy scope or human-in-the-loop boundaries.
gate_scores.rationale: The planning does not include detailed autonomous decision-making processes.

gate_scores.criterion: Autonomy scope, human-in-the-loop boundaries, and override conditions are defined.
gate_scores.evidence: Artificial intelligence is planned for real-time decision-making.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence from Step 3 output. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.OS, TW.SC

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can detect anomalies or changing conditions in real time.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of detecting anomalies or taking corrective actions in real time.
gate_scores.rationale: The planning does not include detailed anomaly detection or response strategies. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI, UX.RM, MG.SM

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can choose among actions based on learned or adaptive logic.
gate_scores.evidence: Real-time monitoring is planned for machine health and tool usage.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence from Step 3 output. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: Past outcomes are stored and used to improve future decisions.
gate_scores.evidence: No explicit evidence of making autonomous decisions with acceptable trust and safety controls.
gate_scores.rationale: The planning does not include detailed decision-making processes or outputs. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can make or execute decisions with acceptable trust and safety controls.
gate_scores.evidence: [step0] Lack of robust security measures for sensitive data.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: TW.SC

action_items_tailored: Define autonomy scope and human-in-the-loop boundaries.
Implement real-time anomaly detection and response strategies.
